name: nopilot-co-studios
description: nopilot-co-studios marketplace — front-of-house Principal + Producer (was creative-director) orchestration, the studios (design, messaging, nitpicker, audience), and a tool-bench (notion-sources, source-enrich, source-summarise, theme-propose, theme-cluster, theme-entity, youtube-transcript).

plugins.name: studios
plugins.description: Cross-studio front-of-house — /studio <brief> enters at the Principal, who shapes the engagement, then hands to the Producer (was creative-director) for routing and delivery (Gamma, Canva, Slack, Gmail).

plugins.name: design-studio
plugins.description: Brand-aware multi-format design: Markdown → PDF, PPTX, HTML, RevealJS via Quarto + Typst, with versioned outputs and visual QA.

plugins.name: messaging-studio
plugins.description: Brand communications: emails, outreach, announcements, nurture, and multi-step sequences, composed in a brand's voice. HTML email via MJML.

plugins.name: nitpicker-studio
plugins.description: Rigorous asset review: visual/format QA, brief fulfilment, audience/ICP fit, standardised tone-of-voice, and a configurable scored test battery (so-what / yawn / sniff), producing a weighted verdict.

plugins.name: audience-studio
plugins.description: Model the reader — a structured psychographic profile + need-state — and critique work against a derived weighted rubric, returning a reader-fit verdict + strengthening areas. Reuses the nitpicker scoring engine.

plugins.name: commercial-studio
plugins.description: Commercial validation + value-based opportunity sizing: deterministic deal validation against rate cards / margin floors / skill-set ratios (beancounter, review-class — reuses the nitpicker engine), and value-based opportunity sizing from client financial research, spend capacity, and addressable market (commercial officer).

plugins.name: delivery-studio
plugins.description: Delivery planning: turn a shaped engagement brief into a structured plan — swimlanes keyed to the cast, sequenced phases with entry/exit criteria, per-phase resourcing + contingency, and a first-class RAID register. Caller-supplied-JSON materialiser with deterministic rollups; optional cost via the commercial rate-card.

plugins.name: notion-sources
plugins.description: Extract a Notion database into a per-source Markdown batch + manifest. Schema-agnostic; incremental. Dumb tool — caller-driven.

plugins.name: source-enrich
plugins.description: Enrich a notion-sources batch in place — fetch each source, populate front matter, extract body (HTML/PDF/text) + assets, tidy bylines.

plugins.name: source-summarise
plugins.description: Materialise caller-supplied per-source summaries (--summary-json) into front matter + a 'Core summary' section. Dumb tool — caller supplies the judgment.

plugins.name: theme-propose
plugins.description: Non-destructive theme-framework proposal for a summarised source batch; materialise a caller-supplied proposal; on --adopt, freeze into theme-manifest.json.

plugins.name: theme-cluster
plugins.description: Materialise caller-supplied theme assignments (--assignments) into themes.json (+ optional source-tag updates). Dumb tool — caller supplies the assignments.

plugins.name: theme-entity
plugins.description: Render theme-entity Markdown dossiers from themes.json + a caller-supplied per-theme synthesis (--spec); author backlinks + a timeline per theme.

plugins.name: youtube-transcript
plugins.description: Extract a YouTube video's transcript to .txt/.md. Captions fast-path with Whisper fallback. Optional Markdown front matter / paragraphs / timestamps / chapters.
